subject: [DMAAP DR] Fix PV,PVC error
commit_message:
[DMAAP DR] Fix PV,PVC error

Change-Id: I12ad57dff925485a48ce512c9e6c3531dc99deec
Signed-off-by: efiacor <fiachra.corcoran@est.tech>
Issue-ID: OOM-2332

entries.message:
Patch Set 1:

Gitlab controller: Deployment put on queue, number 1 on the queue.

Patch Set 1:

Gitlab Orange 1: Chained-CI build started, max time: 14400 seconds

Patch Set 1:

Thanks @Fiachra,
fyi I'm working on a broader patch which will make use of templates for PV, PVC, Services, STS in order to be k8s v1.16+ compliant.
Should be available today I hope!
